titleStmt.title: SII 5.429: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 429. (A.R. No. 139-A of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . ṣrikomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīsundara pāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 15 vatu meṣanāyaṟṟu munṟāntiyatiyum Apara
pakṣattu[ Ēkādaśi] yum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa catayattu nāḷ Amutakuṇavaḷanāṭṭup paruttippāṭāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaccaturvvedi maṅkalat
tup perumelūrk kolavāmaṉaṉ Āpaṟsahāyabha ṭṭaṉeṉ Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyilil Ādi caṇḍeśvarade vaṟkup piṭupāṭu
paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūr sabh Aiyārpakkal Ūrkkuḷam ciparāntakaṉeriyil melkoppil nāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyeṉāy Aṉupavit
tu varukiṟa nilattukku vilaipra māṇattiṉpaṭi nāṉkellaiyum peci perumāḷ kulacekaratevar Eṉakkudarmmadā na Iṟaiyiliyāka dā ṉam paṇṇiya
ruḷi nāṉ Aṉupavittu varukiṟa nilattile Eṉakkum Eṉ vargga ttāṟkum naṉṟāka Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyanāyaṉārkku Immāsa ttil ti
rubhara ṇiyile Aṉavaratāṉaṉāle kalavariciyum Itukkuk kaṟiyamutuḷḷiṭṭu Amutuceytaruḷa veṇṭuvaṉavu miṭṭu Amutuceyvippeṉākavum Ippa
ṭi yāṇṭutoṟuñ cittirait tirubhara ṇiyile Amutuceyvippeṉākavum Ippaṭi cantrāditya vaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvatāka I
pparicu piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ perumelūr kolavāmanaṉ Āpaṟsahāya- bha ṭṭaṉeṉ Ādi caṇḍeśva rade vaṟku Ippaṭikku Ivai perumelūr kolavāmaṉaṉ [..]
Digital edition of SII 5.429 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
